violations.text: Handwashing sink is lacking signage in the ware washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
A hose were observed in the hand-washing sink in ware washing area A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The dishwasher in kitchen is in a poor repair. Per PIC, dishwasher is not in use. Washing and sanitizing is done at 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Women's restroom handsink is in poor repair, sensor not responsive. Per store manager, work order in place. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The hand-washing sink in the beverage area and food prep area were lacking paper towels. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink/black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
